title: Blowgun and Blowdarts
description: Poison Darts! Tranquilizer Darts! Use your Blowgun to fight and surprise enemies!
body:
# Blowgun

## How to craft:

To make a *Blowgun*, use 3 bamboo and 1 feather.

![Blowgun Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9307d37a0ef4f110468592a5b26fafa33db3625.png)

To make *darts*, use 1 iron nugget, 1 stick, and 1 feather in any configuration.

![Dart Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1fb8c05877dadd7df9a106afed3f5f57cef581e.png)

To make *Tranquilizer Darts*, use 8 darts and 1 lilac.

![Tranquilizer Dart Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b48c31252d9da2c1b9d647025ba7359887ab7914.png)

To make *Poison Darts*, use 8 darts and 1 dart frog poison. *Dart Frog Poison* is a new drop from frogs!

![Poison Dart Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e6f48959f18a5c63d023671ed5bdfb651ae37c.png)

## How to Use:

Simply place your dart of choice in your offhand, and your blowgun in your main hand. Hold right click to aim, and then hold sneak to blow!

## Extra Notes

**Tip**: The Tranquilizer Darts deal no damage to mobs, and last for 30 seconds (Only 10 on players). This makes them an excellent solution for transporting villagers and other mobs!

As a bonus, I have a couple extra settings in the datapack if you type "/function blowgun:settings"

Thank you for downloading!
